hero.badge: Remote Contract Data Engineer — Job 6117 · Contract
hero.description: Data engineer with fifteen years building pipelines, governed warehouse assets, and reporting layers in regulated enterprise environments. Python and SQL for ELT workflows, query optimization, and data quality monitoring. Contract work spans Databricks batch pipelines, large scale warehouse analytics, metadata and lineage architecture, and client facing Power BI and Tableau dashboards. Available immediately for remote contract work from northern Illinois.

highlights.label: Data engineering, SQL development, ELT pipelines, Python, Databricks, query optimization, data warehouse design, metadata management, data lineage, data quality monitoring, multi source integration, Power BI, Tableau, batch analytics, governed data assets, requirements translation, remote contract delivery

items.title: Senior Data Engineering and Analytics Pipeline Specialist
items.organization: Regulated financial services enterprise, remote hybrid contract, Chief Data Office ecosystem
bullets: Designed and maintained batch ELT workflows on Databricks transforming high volume actuarial, finance, and operational sources into governed analytical datasets.
Wrote and tuned SQL across lakehouse environments for recurring reporting, ad hoc requests, and performance sensitive valuation extracts.
Built enterprise metadata and lineage tooling adopted as the authoritative schema reference for a trillion record warehouse program.
Statistical outlier detection and action monitor reporting flagged attribute shifts before downstream consumers relied on the data.

items.title: Data Integration and Reporting Engineer
items.organization: Global manufacturing group, regional finance leadership
bullets: Modernized executive reporting with automated KPI dashboards and SQL driven data packages for finance and operations leadership.
Translated ambiguous business questions into scoped data models and recurring reporting outputs on planning timelines.
Governance and quality checks on operational reporting before numbers reached executive review.

items.title: Contract Data Validation and Reconciliation Analyst
items.organization: Commercial banking and public sector financial systems, part time contract
bullets: Validated SQL reporting outputs against source extracts with documented reconciliation routines and sign off before internal distribution.
Executed user acceptance style test cycles with defect tracking and sign off documentation in regulated public sector financial environments.
